name: Order Intake Smoke Evalset
description: Smoke-tier evalset for the 8-stage Order Intake pipeline. Exercises the pipeline end-to-end against live Gemini (clarify + summary LlmAgents), live LlamaClassify + LlamaExtract, and a local Firestore emulator. Each case pipes the absolute path of a .eml fixture as user input; IngestStage materialises the EmailEnvelope from disk. Loose thresholds per /adk-eval-guide: the summary text is Gemini-generated so literal response-match is expected to fail — we grade completion, not perfection.

notes: Cases shipped: patterson (AUTO_APPROVE), redline_urgent (AUTO_APPROVE expected, discover at run time if it routes CLARIFY instead), birch_valley_reply (reply-handled short-circuit).

Cases deferred: a dedicated CLARIFY-scoring fixture (0.80 <= score < 0.95). Blocked on the subagent not having a running Firestore emulator + seeded master data, so we cannot discover which existing fixture lands in the clarify band at authoring time. TODO: once emulator is up and master data is seeded, run OrderValidator against each fixture's ExtractedOrder and pin a case whose aggregate_confidence is in [0.80, 0.95).

Prerequisites documented in tests/eval/README.md. Case 4 (birch_valley) additionally requires running tests/eval/fixtures/seed_birch_valley_exception.py before invoking adk eval so the PENDING_CLARIFY parent exception exists.

parts.text: Processed 1 purchase order from Patterson Industrial Supply. 1 order created, 0 exceptions opened, 0 documents skipped.
Processed the urgent redline purchase order. 1 order created, 0 exceptions opened, 0 documents skipped.
Reply detected on existing clarify thread; advanced the pending exception to awaiting review. 0 orders created, 0 exceptions opened, 0 documents skipped.
